title: WF2026: Software Factories & Keynotes ft. Microsoft, OpenAI, OpenClaw, Z.ai (GLM), MiniMax, HF
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 convenes major AI companies at Moscone West in San Francisco on June 30, 2026, featuring keynotes from Microsoft, OpenAI, OpenClaw, Z.ai (GLM), MiniMax, and Hugging Face. The event highlights software factories as a central theme in AI engineering and industry practice.
writeup: This video covers the AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held at Moscone West in San Francisco on June 30, 2026, and its keynote lineup featuring Microsoft, OpenAI, OpenClaw, Z.ai (GLM), MiniMax, and Hugging Face. The central theme is software factories as a framework for AI engineering and industry practice. The gathering matters because it brings these major AI companies together on a single stage to present their perspectives.
